codeExecutor.welcomeMessage: Welcome to Opik! Click {{run}} to execute the code sample
codeExecutor.loggedToDashboard: OPIK: Your LLM calls have been logged to your Opik dashboard,

integrationExplorer.typeScriptSdkDescription: Bring observability and evaluations to your JS apps
integrationExplorer.quickInstallDescription: Set up Opik fast with Cursor, Copilot, Windsurf, or your favorite AI assistant.
integrationExplorer.detailsDescription: It all starts with a trace. Follow these quick steps to log your first set of LLM calls so you can use Opik to analyze them and improve performance.
integrationExplorer.installOpikDescription: Install Opik from the command line using pip.
integrationExplorer.runCodeWithIntegration: Run the following code to get started with {{title}}
integrationExplorer.getOpikIntegrated: Get Opik integrated instantly by copying this prompt to Cursor, Claude, or any AI coding assistant
integrationExplorer.setUpOpikDescription: Use this prompt with your AI coding assistant of choice to integrate Opik with you application.
integrationExplorer.needSomeHelpDescription: Get help from your team or ours. Choose the option that works best for you.
integrationExplorer.requestIntegrationDescription: Please let our team know which additional integration you would like to see supported in Opik.
integrationExplorer.describeIntegrationPlaceholder: Describe the integration you'd like to see...
integrationExplorer.needHelpGettingStarted: Need help getting started? Find useful resources here, or
integrationExplorer.watchShortVideo: Watch a short video to guide you through setup and key features.
integrationExplorer.checkOutDocs: Check out our docs and helpful guides to get started.
integrationExplorer.integrateOpikWithLlm: Integrate Opik with your LLM application
integrationExplorer.exploreOpikDescription: Explore Opik by testing things out in the playground or browsing our Demo project. No setup required.
integrationExplorer.dataFlowDescription: If everything is set up correctly, your data should start flowing into the Opik platform.
integrationExplorer.runCodeToGetStarted: Run the following code to get started
integrationExplorer.playgroundDescription: You can run prompt evaluations from the Opik platform using the Playground. This allows you to test different prompts on any test suites available in the platform.
integrationExplorer.learnMorePlayground: You can learn more about running evaluations in the playground in the
integrationExplorer.getStartedPlayground: You can get started today by navigating to the
integrationExplorer.playgroundUsage: From there, you can add prompts with variables in the format
integrationExplorer.evaluateAgainstSuites: and evaluate them against your Opik test suites.
integrationExplorer.requestMinLength: Please provide at least 10 characters describing the integration
integrationExplorer.requestMaxLength: Description must be 1000 characters or less

validation.minLength: Please provide at least 10 characters describing the integration
validation.maxLength: Description must be 1000 characters or less
